# Two classes -- exercises the flush-on-next-Name path, MaxMP field,
# and multiple Spell entries.

Name            Mage
Agility         2
Dexterity       1
Strength        -1
Wisdom          5
ArmorStr        0
Charisma        0
MaxHP           7
MaxMP           15
Gold            50
Spell           1
Spell           2
Spell           3

Name            Ranger
Agility         5
Dexterity       6
Strength        3
Wisdom          2
ArmorStr        1
Charisma        2
MaxHP           9
MaxMP           4
Gold            200
Spell           8
